text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcPropagatingAccountInfo t
JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.CreatedBy
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcPropagatingChildProfileAuthorization t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcChildProfileAuthorization cpa ON t.hcChildProfileAuthorizationId = cpa.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cpa.childprofileid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

DELETE FROM dbo.hcProviderBillingCode
FROM dbo.hcProviderBillingCode t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.AppointmentPropagation ap
    WHERE ap.PropagatingProviderBillingCodeId = t.id
);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcProviderBillingCodeCredentials t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcProviderBillingCode bc ON t.hcProviderBillingCodeId = bc.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON bc.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

DELETE t
FROM hcRolePermissions t
JOIN dbo.hcPermissionsAccessLevels al ON al.id = t.hcPermissionsAccessLevelId
JOIN dbo.AccountRole r ON r.id = t.roleId
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON r.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    t.id NOT IN (3558797);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcServiceFunder t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcFunder hf ON t.hcFunderid = hf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON hf.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldOptionValues t
JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.StaffMemberId
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE t.id NOT IN (8181, 9533);
/**WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    )
    AND t.Id NOT IN (83078);  -- skip known bad row
    ***/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldValues t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.StaffMemberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON tm.accountInfoId = atd.AccountId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
